prompt: I have about 12,000 labeled chest X-ray images in my catalog and I need to set up a training pipeline. I need a complete dataset with all the images, then split it 70/15/15 for train/val/test with stratified sampling on the diagnosis label. The feature table is Image_Diagnosis and the label column is Diagnosis_Image. Make sure the splits have ground truth labels marked.

assertions.name: ensures_catalog_connection
assertions.description: Should verify or establish catalog connection as first step
assertions.check: mentions connect_catalog or checking deriva://catalog/connections before any dataset operations

assertions.name: checks_existing_datasets_first
assertions.description: Should search for existing datasets before creating a new one
assertions.check: reads deriva://catalog/datasets or otherwise checks existing datasets

assertions.name: registers_element_type
assertions.description: Should register Image as a dataset element type

assertions.name: wraps_in_execution
assertions.description: Should create an execution for provenance
assertions.check: calls create_execution and start_execution before dataset operations

assertions.name: creates_complete_labeled_dataset
assertions.description: Should create dataset with Complete and Labeled types
assertions.check: calls create_dataset with dataset_types including both Complete and Labeled

assertions.name: uses_dry_run_first
assertions.description: Should preview the split with dry_run before executing
assertions.check: calls split_dataset with dry_run=true before the real split

assertions.name: correct_split_ratios
assertions.description: Should use test_size=0.15 and val_size=0.15 for 70/15/15

assertions.name: correct_stratify_column
assertions.description: Should use denormalized column name Image_Diagnosis_Diagnosis_Image

assertions.name: marks_splits_labeled
assertions.description: Should add Labeled type to all partitions
assertions.check: training_types, testing_types, and validation_types all include 'Labeled'
